footer.disclaimer: Research portfolio project. Educational use only - not a medical device.

analysis.title: New analysis
analysis.intro: Upload a single histopathology patch to run it through the research model.
analysis.disclaimer: This tool is an educational and research project, not a medical device. It does not provide a diagnosis and must not be used for clinical decisions.
analysis.submitError: Something went wrong while analyzing this image. Please try again.

upload.dropTitle: Drag and drop an image, or click to choose a file
upload.modelUnavailable: The analysis model is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.
upload.requirements: Images must be exactly {{width}} × {{height}} pixels, PNG or JPEG, up to {{maxSize}}.

errors.empty: This file is empty. Choose a different image.
errors.unsupportedType: Only PNG and JPEG images are supported.
errors.tooLarge: This file is larger than the {{maxSize}} limit. Choose a smaller image.
errors.corrupt: This file could not be read as an image. It may be corrupted - try a different file.
errors.dimensionsMismatch: This image is {{actualWidth}} × {{actualHeight}} px, but the model requires exactly {{expectedWidth}} × {{expectedHeight}} px. Crop or resize the image and try again.

confirm.title: Ready to analyze
confirm.processingNotice: The image is processed in memory for this analysis only and is not stored. Results require expert interpretation and are not a diagnosis.

syntheticNotice.synthetic: This is a synthetic test model used for demonstration. Its output has no medical meaning whatsoever.
syntheticNotice.unknown: This result may have been produced by a synthetic test model with no medical meaning. The currently active model could not be confirmed to match.

result.genericError: We could not load this analysis. Please try again.
result.interpretationGuidance: The model assigned the highest probability to this category. This result requires expert interpretation and is not a medical diagnosis.
result.limitationNotice: This tool does not provide a medical diagnosis. It is a research demonstration and may be wrong, especially on images unlike its training data.

probabilities.title: Class probabilities
probabilities.subtitle: All categories the model considered, with their probability.
probabilities.unavailable: Probabilities are not available for this result.

image.title: Original image
image.notStored: The original image is not stored and can only be shown immediately after analysis.

gradcam.title: Visual explanation (Grad-CAM)
gradcam.explanation: Grad-CAM highlights regions that influenced the model's output. It does not prove why the model decided what it did, is not a lesion boundary, a segmentation result, or a clinical annotation.
gradcam.overlayAlt: Grad-CAM highlighted regions overlaid on the image
gradcam.disclaimer: Grad-CAM highlights regions associated with the model output. It is not a biological explanation and must not be used as a diagnosis.

unavailable.not_requested: A visual explanation was not requested for this analysis.
unavailable.failed: Generating a visual explanation failed for this analysis. The prediction result above is still valid.
unavailable.disabled: Visual explanations are currently disabled for this model.
unavailable.never_persisted: Visual explanations are only available immediately after running an analysis and are not stored afterwards.

history.title: Analysis history
history.intro: Your past analyses. Images and visual explanations are not stored - only the result.
history.error: We could not load your analysis history. Please try again.
history.empty: You haven't analyzed any images yet.
